form.title: Analyze a Facebook page
form.subtitle: Collect reel URLs via the console script, then analyze them here.
form.scriptHint: This script is read-only. Use Copy to paste in Facebook console.

usage.title: Quick Guide
usage.step1: Open Facebook and go to the 'Reels' or 'Videos' section.
usage.step2: Scroll down to load all the videos you want to download.
usage.step3: Open DevTools Console (Press F12), paste the script, and hit Enter.
usage.step4: Wait for 'Result copied to clipboard!' message to appear.
usage.step5: Return to this app and paste (Ctrl+V) into the box below.
usage.step6: Click 'Analyze', select your videos, and start downloading.

tour.description: Follow this quick tour to learn how to download Facebook videos in seconds.
tour.step1_desc: Copy this script, then go to the Facebook 'Reels' section. Open your browser console (F12) and paste it to collect all video URLs automatically.
tour.step2_desc: Paste the items you collected from the Facebook console here. Then click 'Analyze' to fetch titles and thumbnails.
tour.step3_desc: Once you start a download, you'll see live progress, speed, and status updates right here.
tour.step4_desc: All your successful downloads are saved here. You can quickly open them in your local folder.

results.title: Detected videos
results.description: Run an analysis to list videos, duration, and source links before downloading.
results.editHint: Update the title used for display and downloads.
results.error: Unable to analyze videos right now.
results.empty: Paste URLs and run analysis to see videos here.

progress.title: Download progress
progress.description: Downloads will stream here with real-time percentages once started.
progress.empty: Start a download to track progress here.

help.title: How to export cookies.txt
help.step1: Install a cookies.txt exporter extension (Get cookies.txt locally or cookies.txt).
help.step2: Log in to Facebook in your browser.
help.step3: Export cookies for facebook.com as cookies.txt.
help.step4: Paste the full cookies.txt content into the field above.
